headline: How The Aflac (AFL) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Earnings And Valuation Targets
summary: Aflac’s latest valuation work keeps the modelled fair value anchored at $113.0, while fresh analyst notes cluster price targets in a band that runs from around $101 at the low end to roughly $118 to $120 at the high end. That tight range reflects a balance between bullish views that highlight capital strength and earnings potential, and more cautious takes that point to sector headwinds and trimmed EPS estimates. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative may shape the way you...
